## Routing

**Tier:** medium
**Signals:** PR description drafting, no file edits, hands-off output contract.

## Summary

- Update sample form handling so submit state and server validation reconciliation are explicit.
- Keep the fixture scope local to `agent-suites/fixtures/sample-app/src/form.tsx`.

## Test Plan

- `npm run agent:test -- --suite code-review`
- `npm run validate:changed -- agent-suites/fixtures/sample-app/src/form.tsx`
